heading: Authorization of additional appropriations; restrictions on use
label: 3022 Authorization of additional appropriations; restrictions on use
text: In addition to appropriations specifically authorized in this chapter, there are authorized to be appropriated $2,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and for each of the two succeeding fiscal years, ending , and , such sums as may be necessary: , That none of these appropriated sums shall be used to retire any indebtedness of the Bank incurred pursuant to . Any sums so appropriated shall remain available until expended.September 30, 1979September 30, 1980September 30, 1981Providedsection 3017 of this title
